name: Iron Apothecary
description: Industrial disruptor. Plague doctor gear, toxic smoke, leaking pipes, grimy green vials. The Iron Apothecary dismantles enemies through systemic chemical failure â€” poisons, corrosives, and hemotoxins applied with surgical precision via a pneumatic syringe spear.

abilities.name: Syringe Lunge
abilities.description: A rapid spear thrust that injects neurotoxin directly into the bloodstream. Deals damage and applies poison.

abilities.name: Acid Stream
abilities.description: A pressurized stream of corrosive acid. Ignores armor plating entirely.

abilities.name: Hemotoxin Impale
abilities.description: A deep spear thrust delivering an unremovable hemotoxin payload. Massive damage and severe bleeding that won't stop.

abilities.name: Antitoxin Jab
abilities.description: Self-administer a restorative compound. The apothecary knows their own chemistry better than anyone. Restores 28 HP.
